case_title: THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR VS. PAZIT ZOHAR

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ZOHAR, PAZIT HEARING SET FOR MAR-11-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,747.00 FILED BY THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR (SAN FRANCISCO) AS TO DEFENDANT ZOHAR, PAZIT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-09-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-10-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS--SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR (SAN FRANCISCO) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZOHAR, PAZIT $1,447.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.96 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,492.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR (SAN FRANCISCO) SERVED MAR-11-2016, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT ZOHAR, PAZIT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-10-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS--SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$45.96) SERVED APR-04-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZOHAR, PAZIT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS--CCSF/TTX/SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PAZIT ZOHAR IS GRANTED. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, PAZIT ZOHAR, IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
